themes.exampleQuote: I always make sure to try their new flavors — because it always surprises me
never received a portion so small for $7 — these portions definitely need to be reevaluated
the waffle cones which they make fresh throughout the day
me and my dog's favorite spot — I always order him a small scoop of vanilla with waffle wedge
the longest line I've seen since the Great State Fair — but we stuck it out

notable_quote: All the flavors tasted fresh and have robust flavors — they allow you to try any flavor before you pick one out.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers return for the rotating flavor calendar and fresh-made waffle cones, but a recurring complaint about small portion sizes at the Bakery Square location puts a ceiling on the five-star rate that 76% haven't cleared.
quarter_narrative: Jeni's came into Spring 2026 with one of the tidiest conversion paths in the Pittsburgh Sweets family — every practical field on Google complete, 450 photos across six categories, and a review pulse that's still active within the last 48 hours. Instagram told a more complicated story: 12 posts and 4 Reels in 30 days is a credible clip, but a 0.49% engagement rate suggests the national account's content isn't landing with Pittsburgh's crowd the way a locally-rooted signal would. Page's holds the family's social momentum crown this issue, and that gap is visible. The rank stays at #2 in Ice Cream as long as sentiment sits just below the family median — closing the portion-size conversation in reviews is the most direct path to closing that gap.
tldr_read: Flawless conversion path and strong visual catalog, but engagement lags on a national Instagram account that doesn't speak Pittsburgh — Icons tier, #2 in Pittsburgh Ice Cream.
tldr_meaning: The review sentiment signal is the one soft axis in an otherwise well-maintained profile — a pattern of portion complaints at a single location is keeping the rating from matching the catalog's visual strength.

playbook.headline: Address the portion complaint directly in-store
playbook.action: The Bakery Square portion grievance appears in multiple reviews; a posted size-and-price reference at the counter would reduce expectation friction before checkout.

playbook.headline: Route Pittsburgh moments to a local content stream
playbook.action: At 0.49% engagement, the national @jenisicecreams feed isn't converting Pittsburgh followers — a geo-tagged Story series or Pittsburgh-specific Reel cadence would close the gap with Page's momentum signal.

playbook.headline: Activate the dog-friendly angle with creators
playbook.action: Two independent reviews mention dogs unprompted — pairing with a Pittsburgh pet or lifestyle creator for a waffle-cone moment is a low-lift fit given the Creator Fit signal already sitting at the family ceiling.
